channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Judge dismisses charges against ex-administrator accused after student shot teacher
item.description: A judge dismissed all charges against a former school administrator accused of ignoring warnings about a 6-year-old with a gun.

item.title: Tennessee fails to execute Tony Carruthers after IV difficulties. State won’t try again for a year
Republican progress on immigration bill stalls out over Trump’s ballroom, DOJ settlement
